meanings.definition: turn on or around an axis or a center
examples: The Earth revolves around the Sun
The lamb roast rotates on a spit over the fire
We rotate the lead soprano every night

meanings.definition: perform a job or duty on a rotating basis
examples: Interns have to rotate for a few months

meanings.definition: cause to turn on an axis or center

examples: These birds can splay out their toes
ballet dancers can rotate their legs out by 90 degrees

meanings.definition: plant or grow in a fixed cyclic order of succession
examples: We rotate the crops so as to maximize the use of the soil

meanings.definition: turned in a circle around an axis
